title: Thai Tom Yum Soup
description: A spicy and sour Thai soup made with tom yum paste, fragrant lemongrass, and your choice of protein.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the lemongrass and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tom yum paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped Thai basil.
